items.raw_excerpt: The LNP government has announced plans for the largest upgrade to Lang Park in 23 years, featuring greater capacity, wraparound screens, and new entertainment zones ahead of next week's budget.
items.summary_en: Queensland's LNP government plans the biggest upgrade to Lang Park in 23 years. The work will add more seats, wraparound screens, and new entertainment areas before next week's budget.

items.title_en: Brisbane's Lang Park Gets Big Upgrade

items.title_original: Brisbane's Lang Park to undergo largest upgrade in 23 years

items.raw_excerpt: Professor Michael Cosmopoulos led a team that unearthed the ancient Greek fragment of a wall painting in 2010 and 2011.
items.summary_en: A wall painting fragment found by Professor Michael Cosmopoulos and his team will be shown at a Brussels museum. The team uncovered the ancient Greek artifact during digs in 2010 and 2011.

items.title_en: Ancient Greek artifact to be shown in Brussels

items.title_original: Artifact excavated by UMSL archaeologist to be showcased at Brussels museum - UMSL Blogs

items.raw_excerpt: Bei Ausgrabungen fГјr den neuen BFH-Campus in Biel stiessen ArchГӨologen auf ein jungsteinzeitliches Dorf, das prГӨzise auf 3842 bis 3838 v. Chr. datiert werden konnte. Die Ergebnisse der Grabungen werden am kommenden Donnerstag in einem Buch der Г–ffentlichkeit vorgestellt.
items.summary_en: Archaeologists found a Stone Age village during work for the new BFH campus in Biel. The village was dated to 3842 to 3838 BC. The findings will be shared with the public in a book next Thursday.
items.summary_ko: мҠӨмң„мҠӨ л№„м—ҳмқҳ мғҲ BFH мә нҚјмҠӨ кіөмӮ¬ мӨ‘ кі кі н•ҷмһҗл“Өмқҙ мӢ м„қкё° мӢңлҢҖ л§Ҳмқ„мқ„ л°ңкІ¬н–ҲлӢӨ. мқҙ л§Ҳмқ„мқҖ кё°мӣҗм „ 3842л…„м—җм„ң 3838л…„ мӮ¬мқҙмқҳ кІғмңјлЎң нҷ•мқёлҗҗлӢӨ. л°ңкөҙ кІ°кіјлҠ” лӢӨмқҢ лӘ©мҡ”мқј мұ…мңјлЎң кіөк°ңлҗ  мҳҲм •мқҙлӢӨ.
items.title_en: Ancient village found under new Biel campus
items.title_ko: л№„м—ҳ мғҲ мә нҚјмҠӨ кіөмӮ¬мһҘм—җм„ң л°ңкІ¬лҗң кі лҢҖ л§Ҳмқ„
items.title_original: ArchГӨologischer Fund in Biel - Ein Sturm zerstГ¶rte das Dorf vor fast 6000 Jahren - Plattform J

items.raw_excerpt: Football has plenty of words that also work outside the stadium. Das Eigentor is one of the most useful, especially if you follow news, politics or public debate in German.
items.summary_en: The article explains the German word "das Eigentor." It means an own goal in football, but people also use it for a mistake that hurts the person who made it.
items.summary_ko: мқҙ кёҖмқҖ лҸ…мқјм–ҙ н‘ңнҳ„ "das Eigentor"лҘј м„ӨлӘ…н•ңлӢӨ. мӣҗлһҳлҠ” м¶•кө¬мқҳ мһҗмұ…кіЁмқ„ лң»н•ҳм§Җл§Ң, мҠӨмҠӨлЎңм—җкІҢ л¶ҲлҰ¬н•ҳкІҢ лҸҢм•„мҳӨлҠ” мӢӨмҲҳлқјлҠ” лң»мңјлЎңлҸ„ м“°мқёлӢӨ.
items.title_en: German Word of the Day: Own Goal
items.title_ko: мҳӨлҠҳмқҳ лҸ…мқјм–ҙ: мһҗмұ…кіЁ
items.title_original: German Word of the Day: das Eigentor

items.raw_excerpt: The Danish company Clever is trying something it believes is very clever indeed: it has done away with bosses to foster creativity and boost group performance.
items.summary_en: Danish company Clever has removed bosses from its workplace. The company says the change is meant to help creativity and improve team performance.
items.summary_ko: лҚҙл§ҲнҒ¬ нҡҢмӮ¬ нҒҙл ҲлІ„к°Җ м§ҒмһҘм—җм„ң мғҒмӮ¬ м ңлҸ„лҘј м—Ҷм•ҙлӢӨ. нҡҢмӮ¬лҠ” мқҙ ліҖнҷ”к°Җ м°Ҫмқҳм„ұмқ„ лҶ’мқҙкі  нҢҖ м„ұкіјлҘј к°ңм„ н•ҳкё° мң„н•ң кІғмқҙлқјкі  л§җн•ңлӢӨ.
items.title_en: Danish Company Removes Bosses
items.title_ko: мғҒмӮ¬лҘј м—Ҷм•Ө лҚҙл§ҲнҒ¬ нҡҢмӮ¬
items.title_original: Danish company does away with bosses to boost performance

items.raw_excerpt: The Centraal Museum is raising its profile with a show devoted to the Utrecht Caravaggisti вҖ“ but it remains firmly grounded in the city
items.source_name: Apollo вҖ“ The International Art Magazine
items.summary_en: The Centraal Museum has a new show about the Utrecht Caravaggisti. The article says the museum has world-class Old Masters, but still keeps a strong local city feel.
items.summary_ko: мң„нҠёл ҲнқҗнҠёмқҳ м„јнҠёлһ„ лҜёмҲ кҙҖмқҙ мң„нҠёл ҲнқҗнҠё м№ҙлқјл°”мЎ° нҷ”нҢҢлҘј лӢӨлЈ¬ м „мӢңлЎң мЈјлӘ©лҸ„лҘј лҶ’мқҙкі  мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ. мқҙ лҜёмҲ кҙҖмқҖ м„ёкі„м Ғ мҲҳмӨҖмқҳ мҳӣ кұ°мһҘ мһ‘н’Ҳмқ„ к°–м·„м§Җл§Ң, м—¬м „нһҲ лҸ„мӢңмҷҖ лӢЁлӢЁнһҲ м—°кІ°лҗң м§Җм—ӯ лҜёмҲ кҙҖмқҳ л¶„мң„кё°лҘј м§ҖнӮӨкі  мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.
